# Team Collab Protocol Pointer

For team-collab projects, follow repo-root `AGENTS.md` and the installed `team-collab-protocol` skill from `https://github.com/dadwadw233/team-collab-skills`.

Context budget: this is a thin pointer. Do not duplicate or load the full playbook here; read only the state quartet by default and load task-specific protocol references on demand.

Use `$handoff <topic>`, `$checkpoint`, and `$team-progress <window>` for team-collab session and teammate-progress flows.

Use `$docs-refresh <audit-doc>` or `/docs-refresh <audit-doc>` when updating Obsidian docs from a staleness audit: archive stale content first, rewrite active docs as current truth, and prefer useful Mermaid diagrams over long prose.
